commands.repair_reason: The protected maintainer label, missing branch-specific real proof, and security-sensitive approval behavior require human release-branch review rather than cleanup closure or automated repair.; Cleared: No concrete security defect was found; the diff keeps approval resolution behind existing iMessage approver authorization, but the approval surface remains merge-sensitive. commands.review_summary:
Backports current-main iMessage native approval reaction polling/handling to `release/2026.5.27` while preserving the .27 plugin command-action prompt text.

PR surface: Source +30, Tests +117. Total +147 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is present in the added poller tests: an unauthorized tapback appears before an authorized one and the authorized reaction must still resolve. I did not execute tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: The protected `maintainer` label, missing branch-specific real proof, and security-sensitive approval behavior require human release-branch review rather than cleanup closure or automated repair.
